---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Mastermind
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What should improve?

Describe the user experience or workflow you want to improve.

## Why does it matter?

Explain the problem this solves.

## Possible approach

Share any design or implementation ideas.

## Privacy considerations

Would this touch provider secrets, 1Password references, saved sessions, exports, or logs?
